name: Socket Security
description: Monitor Socket supply chain security scanning for npm package vulnerability compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Socket at https://socket.dev
2. Go to Settings → API Keys to generate a key
3. Base64 encode 'api_key:' (with colon, empty password)
4. Find your org slug in the dashboard URL
5. Enter both below

credentialFields.label: Encoded API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'api_key:' (api_key with empty password). Command: echo -n 'your_api_key:' | base64

credentialFields.label: Organization Slug
credentialFields.helpText: Your Socket organization slug (from the dashboard URL)

checks.name: Secure Code
checks.description: Verifies Socket is scanning npm packages for supply chain vulnerabilities

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Verifies Socket monitors code changes for newly introduced vulnerable packages
